mapper.sql: rrti.group_id, rrti.operation_code, rrti.error_msg, rrti.data_status, rrti.dept_name, rrti.job_name, rrti.name, rrti.gender, rrti.height, rrti.weight, rrti.birthday, rrti.native_place, rrti.nation, rrti.marital_status, rrti.political, rrti.mobile_phone, rrti.email, rrti.address, rrti.id_number, rrti.original_contract_flag, rrti.occupational_diseases_flag, rrti.confidentiality_restrictions_flag, rrti.health_flag, rrti.entry_time, rrti.half_name, rrti.half_company, rrti.half_post, rrti.half_tele, rrti.father_name, rrti.father_company, rrti.father_post, rrti.father_tele, rrti.mother_name, rrti.mother_company, rrti.mother_post, rrti.mother_tele, rrti.first_child_name, rrti.first_child_sex, rrti.first_child_birthday, rrti.first_child_company, rrti.second_child_name, rrti.second_child_sex, rrti.second_child_birthday, rrti.second_child_company, rrti.relationship_flag, rrti.relationship_name, rrti.relationship_dept_name, rrti.relationship, rrti.first_education, rrti.first_school, rrti.first_specialized_subject, rrti.first_enrollment_time, rrti.first_graduation_time, rrti.first_enrollment, rrti.second_education, rrti.second_school, rrti.second_specialized_subject, rrti.second_enrollment_time, rrti.second_graduation_time, rrti.second_enrollment, rrti.first_company, rrti.first_work_start_time, rrti.first_work_end_time, rrti.first_work_depart, rrti.first_work_post, rrti.first_work_salary_old, rrti.first_work_reasons_leaving, rrti.first_work_witness, rrti.first_work_tele, rrti.second_company, rrti.second_work_start_time, rrti.second_work_end_time, rrti.second_work_depart, rrti.second_work_post, rrti.second_work_salary_old, rrti.second_work_reasons_leaving, rrti.second_work_witness, rrti.second_work_tele, rrti.third_company, rrti.third_work_start_time, rrti.third_work_end_time, rrti.third_work_depart, rrti.third_work_post, rrti.third_work_salary_old, rrti.third_work_reasons_leaving, rrti.third_work_witness, rrti.third_work_tele, rrti.fourth_company, rrti.fourth_work_start_time, rrti.fourth_work_end_time, rrti.fourth_work_depart, rrti.fourth_work_post, rrti.fourth_work_salary_old, rrti.fourth_work_reasons_leaving, rrti.fourth_work_witness, rrti.fourth_work_tele, rrti.first_train, rrti.first_train_start_time, rrti.first_train_end_time, rrti.first_train_time, rrti.first_train_address, rrti.first_train_company, rrti.first_train_credential, rrti.second_train, rrti.second_train_start_time, rrti.second_train_end_time, rrti.second_train_time, rrti.second_train_address, rrti.second_train_company, rrti.second_train_credential, rrti.first_award, rrti.first_award_time, rrti.first_award_dept, rrti.first_award_description, rrti.second_award, rrti.second_award_time, rrti.second_award_dept, rrti.second_award_description, rrti.title_name, rrti.title_level, rrti.title_evaluation_time, rrti.first_level_self, rrti.first_level_mechanism, rrti.second_hobby, rrti.second_level_self, rrti.second_level_mechanism, rrti.third_level_self, rrti.fourth_hobby, rrti.fifth_hobby, rrti.sixth_hobby, rrti.id, rrti.create_time, rrti.create_by, rrti.update_time, rrti.update_by,rrti.submit_question_time,rrti.expected_salary,rrti.emergency_contact_name,rrti.emergency_contact_phone, rrti.need_time,rrti.source,rrti.source_detail,rrti.source_ip,rrti.first_enrollment_time_new, rrti.second_enrollment_time_new,rrti.first_work_time_new,rrti.second_work_time_new, rrti.third_work_time_new,rrti.fourth_work_time_new,rrti.first_train_time_new,rrti.second_train_time_new

${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_group_id, ${tAlias}.operation_code as ${tAlias}_operation_code, ${tAlias}.error_msg as ${tAlias}_error_msg, ${tAlias}.data_status as ${tAlias}_data_status, ${tAlias}.dept_name as ${tAlias}_dept_name, ${tAlias}.job_name as ${tAlias}_job_name, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.gender as ${tAlias}_gender, ${tAlias}.height as ${tAlias}_height, ${tAlias}.weight as ${tAlias}_weight, ${tAlias}.birthday as ${tAlias}_birthday, ${tAlias}.native_place as ${tAlias}_native_place, ${tAlias}.nation as ${tAlias}_nation, ${tAlias}.marital_status as ${tAlias}_marital_status, ${tAlias}.political as ${tAlias}_political, ${tAlias}.mobile_phone as ${tAlias}_mobile_phone, ${tAlias}.email as ${tAlias}_email, ${tAlias}.address as ${tAlias}_address, ${tAlias}.id_number as ${tAlias}_id_number, ${tAlias}.original_contract_flag as ${tAlias}_original_contract_flag, ${tAlias}.occupational_diseases_flag as ${tAlias}_occupational_diseases_flag, ${tAlias}.confidentiality_restrictions_flag as ${tAlias}_confidentiality_restrictions_flag, ${tAlias}.health_flag as ${tAlias}_health_flag, ${tAlias}.entry_time as ${tAlias}_entry_time, ${tAlias}.half_name as ${tAlias}_half_name, ${tAlias}.half_company as ${tAlias}_half_company, ${tAlias}.half_post as ${tAlias}_half_post, ${tAlias}.half_tele as ${tAlias}_half_tele, ${tAlias}.first_child_name as ${tAlias}_first_child_name, ${tAlias}.first_child_sex as ${tAlias}_first_child_sex, ${tAlias}.first_child_birthday as ${tAlias}_first_child_birthday, ${tAlias}.first_child_company as ${tAlias}_first_child_company, ${tAlias}.second_child_name as ${tAlias}_second_child_name, ${tAlias}.second_child_sex as ${tAlias}_second_child_sex, ${tAlias}.second_child_birthday as ${tAlias}_second_child_birthday, ${tAlias}.second_child_company as ${tAlias}_second_child_company, ${tAlias}.relationship_flag as ${tAlias}_relationship_flag, ${tAlias}.relationship_name as ${tAlias}_relationship_name, ${tAlias}.relationship_dept_name as ${tAlias}_relationship_dept_name, ${tAlias}.relationship as ${tAlias}_relationship, ${tAlias}.second_education as ${tAlias}_second_education, ${tAlias}.second_school as ${tAlias}_second_school, ${tAlias}.second_specialized_subject as ${tAlias}_second_specialized_subject, ${tAlias}.second_enrollment_time as ${tAlias}_second_enrollment_time, ${tAlias}.second_graduation_time as ${tAlias}_second_graduation_time, ${tAlias}.second_enrollment as ${tAlias}_second_enrollment, ${tAlias}.first_company as ${tAlias}_first_company, ${tAlias}.first_work_start_time as ${tAlias}_first_work_start_time, ${tAlias}.first_work_end_time as ${tAlias}_first_work_end_time, ${tAlias}.second_work_time_new as ${tAlias}_second_work_time_new, ${tAlias}.third_work_time_new as ${tAlias}_third_work_time_new, ${tAlias}.fourth_work_time_new as ${tAlias}_fourth_work_time_new, ${tAlias}.first_train_time_new as ${tAlias}_first_train_time_new, ${tAlias}.second_train_time_new as ${tAlias}_second_train_time_new

select
,rr.recruitment_flag as recruitment_flag,rr.enabled_flag as rr_enabled_flag, (select rr.id from re_recruitment rr where convert(bigint, rr.attribute4) = rrti.id and convert(bigint, rr.attribute5) = rrti.group_id) as re_id, convert(varchar(10), rrti.birthday, 120) as birthday_str, convert(varchar(10), rrti.entry_time, 120) as entry_time_str, case when rrti.first_child_birthday is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.first_child_birthday, 120) end as first_child_birthday_str, case when rrti.second_child_birthday is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.second_child_birthday, 120) end as second_child_birthday_str, case when rrti.first_enrollment_time is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.first_enrollment_time, 120) end as first_enrollment_time_str, case when rrti.first_graduation_time is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.first_graduation_time, 120) end as first_graduation_time_str, case when rrti.second_enrollment_time is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.second_enrollment_time, 120) end as second_enrollment_time_str, case when rrti.second_graduation_time is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.second_graduation_time, 120) end as second_graduation_time_str, case when rrti.first_work_start_time is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.first_work_start_time, 120) end as first_work_start_time_str, case when rrti.first_work_end_time is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.first_work_end_time, 120) end as first_work_end_time_str, case when rrti.second_work_start_time is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.second_work_start_time, 120) end as second_work_start_time_str, case when rrti.second_work_end_time is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.second_work_end_time, 120) end as second_work_end_time_str, case when rrti.third_work_start_time is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.third_work_start_time, 120) end as third_work_start_time_str, case when rrti.third_work_end_time is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.third_work_end_time, 120) end as third_work_end_time_str, case when rrti.fourth_work_start_time is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.fourth_work_start_time, 120) end as fourth_work_start_time_str, case when rrti.fourth_work_end_time is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.fourth_work_end_time, 120) end as fourth_work_end_time_str, case when rrti.first_train_start_time is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.first_train_start_time, 120) end as first_train_start_time_str, case when rrti.first_train_end_time is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.first_train_end_time, 120) end as first_train_end_time_str, case when rrti.second_work_end_time is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.second_work_end_time, 120) end as second_work_end_time_str, case when rrti.second_train_start_time is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.second_train_start_time, 120) end as second_train_start_time_str, case when rrti.second_train_end_time is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.second_train_end_time, 120) end as second_train_end_time_str, case when rrti.first_award_time is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.first_award_time, 120) end as first_award_time_str, case when rrti.second_award_time is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.second_award_time, 120) end as second_award_time_str, case when rrti.title_evaluation_time is null then '' else convert(varchar(10), rrti.title_evaluation_time, 120) end as title_evaluation_time_str from re_recruitment_temp_interface rrti
mapper.insert: insert into re_recruitment_temp_interface (group_id, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, dept_name, job_name, name, gender, height, weight, birthday, native_place, nation, marital_status, political, mobile_phone, email, address, id_number, original_contract_flag, occupational_diseases_flag, confidentiality_restrictions_flag, health_flag, entry_time, half_name, half_company, half_post, half_tele, father_name, father_company, father_post, father_tele, mother_name, mother_company, mother_post, mother_tele, first_child_name, first_child_sex, first_child_birthday, first_child_company, second_child_name, second_child_sex, second_child_birthday, second_child_company, relationship_flag, relationship_name, relationship_dept_name, relationship, first_education, first_school, first_specialized_subject, first_enrollment_time, first_graduation_time, first_enrollment, second_education, second_school, second_specialized_subject, second_enrollment_time, second_graduation_time, second_enrollment, first_company, first_work_start_time, first_work_end_time, first_work_depart, first_work_post, first_work_salary_old, first_work_reasons_leaving, first_work_witness, first_work_tele, second_company, second_work_start_time, second_work_end_time, second_work_depart, second_work_post, second_work_salary_old, second_work_reasons_leaving, second_work_witness, second_work_tele, third_company, third_work_start_time, third_work_end_time, third_work_depart, third_work_post, third_work_salary_old, third_work_reasons_leaving, third_work_witness, third_work_tele, fourth_company, fourth_work_start_time, fourth_work_end_time, fourth_work_depart, fourth_work_post, fourth_work_salary_old, fourth_work_reasons_leaving, fourth_work_witness, fourth_work_tele, first_train, first_train_start_time, first_train_end_time, first_train_time, first_train_address, first_train_company, first_train_credential, second_train, second_train_start_time, second_train_end_time, second_train_time, second_train_address, second_train_company, second_train_credential, first_award, first_award_time, first_award_dept, first_award_description, second_award, second_award_time, second_award_dept, second_award_description, title_name, title_level, title_evaluation_time, first_level_self, first_level_mechanism, second_hobby, second_level_self, second_level_mechanism, third_level_self, fourth_hobby, fifth_hobby, sixth_hobby, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, submit_question_time,expected_salary,emergency_contact_name,emergency_contact_phone,need_time, source,source_detail,source_ip,first_enrollment_time_new, second_enrollment_time_new,first_work_time_new,second_work_time_new, third_work_time_new,fourth_work_time_new,first_train_time_new,second_train_time_new) values (#{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{height,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, #{nativePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maritalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{political,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mobilePhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{originalContractFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{occupationalDiseasesFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{confidentialityRestrictionsFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{healthFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{entryTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{halfName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{halfCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{halfPost,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{halfTele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fatherName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fatherCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fatherPost,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fatherTele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{motherName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{motherCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{motherPost,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{motherTele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstChildName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstChildSex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstChildBirthday,jdbcType=DATE}, #{firstChildCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secondChildName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secondChildSex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secondChildBirthday,jdbcType=DATE}, #{secondChildCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relationshipFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{relationshipName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relationshipDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relationship,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstEducation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstSchool,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstSpecializedSubject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstEnrollmentTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{firstGraduationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{firstEnrollment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secondEducation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secondSchool,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secondSpecializedSubject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secondEnrollmentTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{secondGraduationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{secondEnrollment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstWorkStartTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{firstWorkEndTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{firstWorkDepart,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstWorkPost,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstWorkSalaryOld,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{firstWorkReasonsLeaving,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstWorkWitness,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstWorkTele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secondCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secondWorkStartTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{secondWorkEndTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{secondWorkDepart,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secondWorkPost,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secondWorkSalaryOld,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{secondWorkReasonsLeaving,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secondWorkWitness,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secondWorkTele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thirdCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thirdWorkStartTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{thirdWorkEndTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{thirdWorkDepart,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thirdWorkPost,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thirdWorkSalaryOld,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{thirdWorkReasonsLeaving,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thirdWorkWitness,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thirdWorkTele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fourthCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fourthWorkStartTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{fourthWorkEndTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{fourthWorkDepart,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fourthWorkPost,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fourthWorkSalaryOld,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{fourthWorkReasonsLeaving,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fourthWorkWitness,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fourthWorkTele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstTrain,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstTrainStartTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{firstTrainEndTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{firstTrainTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstTrainAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstTrainCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstTrainCredential,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secondTrain,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secondTrainStartTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{secondTrainEndTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{secondTrainTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secondTrainAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secondTrainCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secondTrainCredential,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstAward,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstAwardTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{firstAwardDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstAwardDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secondAward,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secondAwardTime,jdbcType=DATE},
